name: Arturo O'Farrill
abstract: Arturo O'Farrill (born June 22, 1960) is a jazz musician, the son of Latin jazz musician, arranger and bandleader Chico O'Farrill, and pianist, composer, and director for the Afro Latin Jazz Orchestra. He is best known for his contributions to contemporary Latin jazz (more specifically Afro-Cuban jazz), having received Grammy Awards and …

interviews.title: Arturo O'Farrill interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 6, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Weston
about_quotes.evidence: November 5th and 6th I’m doing two concerts with Arturo O’Farrill’s Cuban Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Vega
about_quotes.evidence: Arturo O’Farrill used to get me, he was a contractor, and he used to get me on studio dates with his father.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Vega interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 20, 2023
